---
title: "One toxin, two outcomes: Indoxyl sulfate drives renal but not cardiac injury Post-AKI"
date: 2025-11-01
author:
  - name: Fogaça-Ruiz, Fernanda
  - name: Falconi, Carlos Alexandre
  - name: Parletta, Aline Cristina
  - name: Sanz, Carmen Lucia
  - name: Nakao, Lia Sumie
  - name: Carneiro-Ramos, Marcela Sorelli
abstract: > 
  Resumo não disponível.
categories: [article]
citation: 
  container-title: "Biochemical and Biophysical Research Communications"
  volume: 789
  doi: "10.1016/j.bbrc.2025.152842"
---

```{=html}
<nav aria-label="breadcrumb">
  <ol class="breadcrumb">
    <li class="breadcrumb-item"><a href="../../index.html">Home</a></li>
    <li class="breadcrumb-item"><a href="../index.html">Publicações</a></li>
    <li class="breadcrumb-item active" aria-current="page">One toxin, two outcomes: Indoxyl sulfate drives renal but not cardiac injury Post-AKI</li>
  </ol>
</nav>
